name: 4pk Organizer Bins with Adhesive - Brightroom™
description:
Add extra storage space to your kitchen cabinet, under the sink or anywhere else with the 4-Pack Organizer Bins with Adhesive from Brightroom™. This pack of four organizer bins comes with varying sizes to help you store cleaning supplies, spare linens and much more. Made of plastic, the bins have an open front for easy access and can be attached anywhere thanks to the adhesive.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
